_comment: HopTrack — MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Started Sprint 173 with supabase-staging only; Context7 added Sprint 176. Supabase MCP points at hoptrack-staging (NOT main in us-east-2) per Supabase docs: 'Supabase MCP is only designed for development and testing purposes.' Full setup instructions: docs/claude-code-setup.md

supabase-staging._comment: Supabase MCP — queries hoptrack-staging for schema introspection, migration planning, RLS debugging, and diagnostic SELECTs. Riley/Quinn/Avery are the primary users. Requires SUPABASE_STAGING_URL and SUPABASE_STAGING_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in your environment or .env.local (gitignored). NEVER point this at HopTrack main (us-east-2).

context7._comment: Context7 MCP — live docs for Next.js 16, Tailwind v4, Supabase SSR 0.9, Framer Motion, and other post-training-cutoff libraries. Exists because AGENTS.md opens with 'This is NOT the Next.js you know' — cures hallucinated API suggestions. Free hosted service; no credentials required. If you hit rate limits, sign up at context7.com/dashboard for a free CONTEXT7_API_KEY and add an env block here. Everyone on the team writing code is a user.
